summary: Comprehensive testing of Hestia Onda 2 features completed. Motor de Reservas (Booking Engine) working perfectly with full booking flow. Guest Portal has minor login validation issue. All backend APIs working 100%.

ui_bugs.issue: Login button becomes disabled during form validation, preventing login attempts

passed_tests: Backend API - All 25 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Booking Engine (/booking) - Complete booking flow working perfectly
Date selection and guest count functionality working
Room availability search and selection working
Guest information form and validation working
Confirmation code generation working (BE304448 generated successfully)
Admin dashboard still working perfectly after Onda 2 changes
Admin login, navigation, and all pages accessible
AI chat functionality (Hestia and Jarbas) working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Guest Portal login form validation - login button gets disabled preventing user login attempts. Check form validation logic in GuestPortalPage.js around line 193.
